title: Nuage Under Eye Cooling Gel – Ideal for Puffy Eyes, Hayfever & Allergies | Hydrates & Infused with Vitamin E (15ml)

features: PUFFINESS RELIEF: Cools & soothes tired under-eyes, helping reduce swelling & puffiness from early starts, sleepless nights or long hours at a screen. Ideal for daily morning routines or after work wind-downs. Keeps eyes looking fresh & awake.

INSTANT COOLING EFFECT: Delivers a refreshing cooling sensation with every application. Perfect after being in the sun or when feeling overheated. Adds an energising boost during mid-day slumps or stuffy environments.

PERFECT FOR ALLERGIES: Helps relieve under-eye irritation caused by pet allergies, dust allergies & hayfever. Use after cleaning, gardening or being around pets to calm itchy, irritated skin. Restores comfort & reduces redness.

TRAVEL SIZED CONVENIENCE: Compact 15ml tube fits easily into handbags, pockets or travel pouches. Ideal for flights, commutes or holidays where eyes feel dry or tired. Freshens eyes on the go, wherever the day leads.

ENRICHED WITH VITAMIN E: Infused with skin-loving Vitamin E to moisturise & nourish delicate skin under the eyes. Helps reduce dryness & irritation caused by hayfever or allergies. Great for daily skin care or when eyes feel tight & tired.

SUITABLE FOR DAILY USE: Gentle enough for everyday morning & evening routines. Helps keep under-eyes looking smooth & well-rested even during allergy season. Use before applying makeup or as a mid-day refresher.
description: Product Description Brighten tired eyes with Nuage Under Eye Cooling Gel, designed to calm and refresh delicate under-eye skin. Infused with nourishing Vitamin E, this lightweight gel instantly cools and soothes, helping to reduce puffiness and signs of fatigue. Whether dealing with early mornings, late nights or seasonal allergies, the gentle formula provides relief from under-eye irritation and dryness. It's especially effective for use during hayfever season or when reacting to dust and pet allergies, helping to ease discomfort and restore comfort. The gel absorbs quickly without leaving residue, making it perfect for everyday use under makeup or on its own. Its compact 15ml tube is ideal for on-the-go application, whether at work, while travelling, or after a long day. The cooling sensation offers an instant pick-me-up, leaving the skin under the eyes feeling fresh, smooth and hydrated. Keep it in a handbag or toiletry bag for quick and easy refreshment whenever needed. Suitable for all skin types and gentle enough for daily use, this travel sized essential is a must-have for anyone looking to care for their under-eye area. Ingredients Aqua, Propylene Glycol, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Paraffinum Liquidum, Caprylyl Glycol, Phoenoxyethanol, Methyl Gluceth-20, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Carbomer, Disodium EDTA, Benzyl Alcohol, Borneol, Aminomethyl Propanol, Niacinamide, Tocopheryl (Vitamin E) Acetate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Ceramide NP Directions Apply under the eye area as necessary, taking care to avoid the eyes. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
